name: SE Ranking
one_line: SEO platform exposing a Data API (keywords, backlinks, domains, AI search) and Project API for managing SEO campaigns.
self_serve_detail: Start a 14-day free trial that includes 100,000 free API credits; generate the API key from the API Dashboard (Profile & Preferences > API Dashboard). Sustained/production Data API access requires an Essential+ paid plan (monthly credit allowance) or a standalone API plan (from $2,148/yr). No human approval needed.

name: MrScraper
one_line: AI-powered web scraping platform with a REST API and hosted MCP server for natural-language data extraction.
self_serve_detail: Sign up at the dashboard; an API token is auto-created (also generate new tokens under profile > API Tokens). Authenticate via x-api-token header or Authorization: Bearer. New accounts include free trial credits; ongoing scraping consumes plan tokens, so real volume requires a paid plan.

name: Apify
one_line: Web scraping and automation platform exposing a REST API to run Actors and read datasets/key-value stores.
self_serve_detail: Create a free account (no card) that includes $5 of free platform credit; grab the API token from the Integrations page in Apify Console. Token is used as Authorization: Bearer or ?token= query param. Usage beyond free credit is pay-as-you-go.

name: Firecrawl
one_line: API to scrape, crawl, and extract structured/LLM-ready web data with built-in anti-bot and JS rendering.
self_serve_detail: Create a free account to get an API key (fc-...) from firecrawl.dev/app/api-keys; also offers a keyless free tier (rate-limited per IP) on the API and MCP. Authenticate with Authorization: Bearer fc-KEY. Paid plans raise rate limits and tool access.

name: Bright Data
one_line: Proxy and web-data platform providing scraping, SERP, Web Unlocker APIs and a managed remote MCP server.
self_serve_detail: Create a Bright Data account; an API token is auto-generated (also in user settings). New users receive free credit for testing (MCP includes 5,000 free requests/month). Authenticate via Authorization: Bearer or token query param. Pay-as-you-go after free credit.
